getCategories.description: Return a list of categories within a forum

getThreads.description: Return a list of threads within a forum

getPosts.description: Return a list of posts within a forum

id.description: The short name(aka ID) of the forum to get Threads

related.description: You may specify relations to include with your response

filters.description: You may specify filters for your response

include.description: You may specify relations to include with your response

order.description: You may specify order to sort your response

query.description: You may specify query forChoices: asc, desc your response

thread.description: Looks up a thread by ID. You may pass us the "ident" query type instead of an ID by including "forum". You may pass us the "link" query type to filter by URL. You must pass the "forum" if you do not have the Pro API Access addon.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return
